category_sources: source_facts.description says recoverpy is a TUI to recover overwritten or deleted data; official GitHub description says it recovers deleted or overwritten files from the terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; official GitHub repository title uses RecoverPy capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the documentation surface for RecoverPy.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says TUI recovery for overwritten or deleted data; official GitHub description mentions terminal recovery of deleted or overwritten files.
